actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Britain's Kyle Edmund has been knocked out of the Aegon Championships at Queen's Club.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A fire has ripped through a house, killing a man.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Ipswich Town have signed Bolton Wanderers striker Joe Feeney on loan until the end of the season.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: United Utilities has upgraded Allonby's wastewater treatment works, doubling its capacity.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 21-year-old man has been arrested after the body of a girl was found in Kent.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Brecon Beacons National Park has thanked the public for donating items for a convoy of trucks taking supplies to the Gurkhas serving in Afghanistan.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Work to bring down the former Oceana building on Kingsway started in October 2015 and was due to take six months.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 26-year-old man has been arrested after an alleged assault at Everton's training ground.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Jeremy Corbyn has been elected as the new leader of the Labour Party.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Judd Trump and Barry Hawkins beat Mark Allen and Joe Swail 4-3 to reach the quarter-finals of the Shanghai Masters.
